# ECU Map Studio 1.2.0

This release adds two boundary-matched least-squares extrapolation policies for extending ECU tables with more source context.

## Highlights

- Local edge trend fits the nearest 4 × 4 source region.
- Global table trend fits every source cell.
- Limited linear remains available and unchanged.
- Trend extrapolation remains constrained by the configurable maximum edge intervals.
- The VS BILINEAR view exposes every difference from the predictable local-linear reference.
- Standard PyInstaller and alternative Nuitka Windows installers are available for testing.

ECU Map Studio performs numerical transformations and cannot determine whether a calibration is mechanically safe. Review and validate every result with appropriate logs and instrumentation.
